title: Craftable Arsenal
description: Makes the weapons added by Rats Arsenal mod craftable
body:
## Features
-This is simple Datapack for [Arsenal](https://modrinth.com/mod/arsenal) adding crafting recipes for the added weapons ([View Screenshots](https://modrinth.com/datapack/craftable-arsenal/gallery))

-This Datapack does **not** remove mobs spawning with the items (the regular way of obtaining them), it just adds an alternative way that may be more convenient for some players
